catalog_row.ModelType: New Keynesian DSGE with home production, Calvo prices, capital accumulation, and government spending shocks
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Housework/home goods; market and home capital; KPR preferences; Calvo pricing; production subsidy; government spending AR(1); Taylor rule

status_row.formula_quality: main model equations available; calvo auxiliary recursions marked needs_review
status_row.steady_state_quality: source-backed first pass; no runtime validation
status_row.notes: Primary Markdown contains the model equations and steady-state calibration; example .mod used only as implementation cross-check.

validation.details: English and Chinese each contain 108 F-number references, with identical ordered F-number sequences and unique equations F1-F25.

unresolved_issues: Calvo auxiliary recursions need source-level appendix or targeted PDF review.
Implementation tax/subsidy wedge `taup` needs reconciliation with the paper's production subsidy `tau`.
The MMB Taylor rule is a restricted implementation of the paper's more general rule.
Capital adjustment cost algebra should be targeted-checked before runnable replication work.
No Dynare runtime validation was performed.
